name: zsnoop-mcp
description: ZFS snapshot exploration and recovery over SSH through the zsnoop-mcp server.

interface.shortDescription: Explore ZFS snapshots and recover files through zsnoop-mcp.
interface.longDescription: Zsnoop MCP packages the upstream zsnoop-mcp stdio server plus operating guidance for ZFS snapshot discovery, diffing, file reads, fetches, and opt-in restore workflows over SSH or local transport.
defaultPrompt: Use Zsnoop MCP to list configured ZFS hosts.
Find when this file disappeared from ZFS snapshots.
Recover a file from a ZFS snapshot with zsnoop-mcp.
